title: polypodium scolopendrinum
intro: Polypodium scolopendrinum, also known as Polypodium vulgare, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Polypodium scolopendrinum include treating skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems, as well as acting as a diuretic and astringent. Herbal preparations of Polypodium scolopendrinum are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
